caption:
Golden light fills the university office as I adjust my navy blazer, the fabric hugging my curves perfectly. I'm Elena, and this spring semester, the classroom walls have become less of a barrier and more of a backdrop for my adventures. My students requested an "extra study session," and I invited them into my private domain. The air smells of rain and old paper, but beneath the crisp collar of my blouse lies a secret warmth. My skirt is high enough to hint at the shape beneath when I cross my legs. A playful glint in my eye, I wait for them to realize the lesson might not be about literature today.
#ElenaTakesClass #SpringSecrets 🌸👠
